contract_summary: Conditional get-wrapper: acquires a reference on the ip_vs_conn object only if its reference count is non-zero (object still alive). Returns true on success (caller now owns a reference) and false on failure (object is dead/dying). Caller MUST check the return value and, if true, must later release the reference with ip_vs_conn_put(). If false, the object must not be dereferenced or used further.
